## Summary

Describe the change and the user or developer problem it solves.

Check all that apply:

- [ ] `kronos_hub/api`
- [ ] `kronos_hub/services`

## Validation

List what you ran locally:

- [ ] `python .\scripts\smoke_check.py`
- [ ] `python -m unittest`
- [ ] relevant example script(s)
- [ ] manual API check

## Docs

- [ ] README updated if behavior changed
- [ ] `docs/api.md` updated if routes or payloads changed
- [ ] `docs/development.md` updated if setup or workflow changed

## Upstream impact

If this PR touches `ai-hedge-fund-main/`, `TradingAgents-main/`, or `Kronos-master/`, explain:

- why the change had to happen there
- whether it should be backported upstream
- whether licensing or provenance notes need updating

## Notes for reviewers

Anything that deserves extra attention, tradeoffs, or follow-up work.
